name: lab-panel-table
title: Lab Panel Table
description: Grouped laboratory results with flags, deltas, and collapsible detail — where a group holding a critical result cannot be collapsed shut.

props.name: groups
props.description: `{ key, label, analytes, defaultCollapsed? }` — the laboratory's grouping, not the UI's.

props.name: LabAnalyte
props.type: { key, label, value, unit, flag?, referenceLow?, referenceHigh?, prior?, significantChange?, concerningDirection?, detail? }

props.name: caption
props.description: Screen-reader caption for the result tables.

clinicalNotes: A group holding a critical result cannot be collapsed: `defaultCollapsed` is ignored for it, the disclosure chevron is hidden, and the group is badged so the reader knows why it will not close. Hiding a critical value behind a disclosure is the single failure this table exists to make impossible — and a caller who set `defaultCollapsed` did so before they knew what was in the panel. Grouping, flags, and reference ranges come from the laboratory; the component classifies nothing. Every flag is rendered as a word as well as a colour, and an analyte with no prior result says so rather than showing a delta of zero.
notes: Composes badge + collapsible + lab-delta-indicator. Pairs with lab-result-chart in the labs-review-block.
